notes: Source: Roland Pro A/V global product specifications page. HDMI version not explicitly stated by Roland; the V-160HD launched in 2021 and supports resolutions up to 1080p60/4K on inputs — HDMI grade is omitted rather than guessed. SDI grade confirmed as 3G-SDI (SMPTE 424M). LAN speed confirmed as 100BASE-TX. The TALLY/GPIO connector is a DB-25 female; mapped to 'rs232' as the closest available type but it is not RS-232 electrically — it carries TTL-level tally and GPIO signals. The RS-232 port is a separate DB-9 male connector. Power is via DC barrel from external AC adapter; exact barrel dimensions not published. The device is 2U rack-mountable. Bluetooth wireless is present for audio input and control but is not a physical port and is excluded. Two AUDIO OUT connectors (XLR and RCA) share the label 'AUDIO OUT' on the unit; both are listed.

ports.name: HDMI IN 1
ports.note: HDCP supported. HDMI version not stated by Roland; inferred HDMI 2.0 based on 2021 launch and supported resolutions.

ports.name: HDMI OUT 1
ports.note: HDCP supported. HDMI version not stated by Roland.

ports.name: SDI OUT 1
ports.note: Conforms to SMPTE 424M (SMPTE 425M-AB), 292M; audio embedded per SMPTE 299M.

ports.name: USB STREAM
ports.note: USB Type-C; used for video/audio streaming output, PC/iPad remote control, and Graphics Presenter input.

ports.name: AUDIO IN 1
ports.note: Combo XLR / 1/4-inch TRS phone; phantom power DC 48V available.

ports.name: AUDIO IN 2
ports.note: Combo XLR / 1/4-inch TRS phone; phantom power DC 48V available.

ports.name: PHONES
ports.note: Stereo 1/4-inch phone jack for headphone monitoring.

ports.name: Reference IN
ports.note: Sync reference input; supports Black Burst, Bi-Level, Tri-Level sync.

ports.name: RS-232
ports.note: DB-9 type male connector for remote control.

ports.name: USB MEMORY
ports.note: USB Type-A for flash drive storage and numeric keypad.

ports.name: CTL/EXP
ports.note: 1/4-inch TRS phone jack for footswitch or expression pedal.

ports.name: TALLY/GPIO
ports.note: DB-25 female connector (not DB-9/RS-232 electrically); 16 tally/GPO channels + 8 GPI channels. Mapped to rs232 as closest available connector type — actual connector is a D-Sub 25-pin female.

ports.name: DC IN
ports.note: Proprietary DC input from included AC adapter; 55W / 2.5A maximum draw. Exact barrel spec not published by Roland.
